name: Sara
subject: $1 ask with 81 days to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
I'm sorry to bother you on a Friday, but tonight I'm asking you to donate $1 to our campaign.

| [](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b794a/27c6da69/2b2b3e51/12fef00/2300875062/VEsH/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q3-2020_sjc_email?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200814-1-EM&amount=1")
---
| Friend,

_**[I'm sorry to bother you on a Friday, but tonight I'm asking you to donate $1 to our campaign.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b794a/27c6da69/2b2b3e51/12fef00/2300875062/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q3-2020_sjc_email?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200814-1-EM&amount=1")**_
---
| [GIVE $1 ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b794a/27c6da69/2b2b3e51/12fef00/2300875062/VEsF/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q3-2020_sjc_email?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200814-1-EM&amount=1")
---
Here's why it matters: The FEC fundraising quarter is almost halfway over, and we are short of our grassroots goal. [_**But if everyone reading this email pitches in $1 or more before midnight tomorrow, we 'll be back on track in no time.**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b794a/27c6da69/2b2b3e51/12fef00/2300875062/VEsC/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q3-2020_sjc_email?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200814-1-EM&amount=1")

---
| [CUSTOM AMOUNT -> ](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b794a/27c6da69/2b2b3e51/12fef04/2300875062/VEsP/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q3-2020_sjc_email?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200814-1-EM")
---
San Diegans deserve a Member of Congress who only answers to them, not to lobbyists or special interests. I haven't accepted a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists and I never will -- and I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to help fund our campaign.

[_**Please, contribute what you can today so we have what it takes to get across the finish line in just 81 days.**_](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b794a/27c6da69/2b2b3e51/12fef00/2300875062/VEsHBQ/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q3-2020_sjc_email?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200814-1-EM&amount=1")

Thank you,

Sara

Friend,

I’ve been thinking back on my first (but not last!) term as your President, and I came across some photos. One in particular stood out to me, and when I saw it, I immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a copy of it.

But, I didn’t want to send you JUST a photograph of me - I wanted to make it unique. So, I told my team to put together a list of my TOP supporters so that I could give them a personalized, signed photo.

BIG NEWS: YOU WERE ON THE LIST TO RECEIVE ONE OF THESE ICONIC SIGNED PHOTOS.

I only have a few of these photographs left, and I really want YOU to have one. Claim yours NOW before they’re gone.

subject: Meeting with Mike

| In 2018, progressive Democrat Mike Siegel turned Texas' 10th district from a safe GOP seat to a national battleground – and in 2020, he's going to finish the job. We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. It’s not fun to be a bearer of bad news. I’d appreciate any help to make Mike happy — he’s working as hard as he can to flip this district. I want him to know this team is doing the same — so if you can pitch in anything you can at this moment that’d be amazing.
Thanks, team!
Nick Merlino

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: Another endorsement with Debates & our Day of Action today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ad7da947cffc5e36/6b5b3de5f84aa6e0c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ad7da947cffc5e36/a4934911031ce02ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Candidate Debates are Scheduled**
As the September primary nears, Corky is so far taking part in three debates, the first moderated by WKXL’s Chris Ryan, host of _New Hampshire Now_.

You can tune in to hear that debate, with Corky and fellow GOP Senate candidate Don Bolduc, Monday, August 17, at 10 a.m. and 5 p.m., and it will be re-aired several more times in the lead-up to the Sept. 8 primary.
You can access the debate on the WKXL site as well at nhtalkradio.com.

Next week, Tuesday, Aug. 18, Corky joins NH Today’s Jack Heath, for another debate with Don Bolduc. Tune in to WGIR at 8 a.m. to hear the cndidates discuss the issues of the day.

Finally, Channel 9 presents a one-hour candidates debate to air Sept. 1 at 7 p.m. on WMUR-TV and stream on www.WMUR.com and WMUR’s mobile app.
|
---
**Join Us for a Day of Action Today!**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ad7da947cffc5e36/971bf8ff4b91f6cdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Join Corky and his supporters in a Day of Action today. We need your help to defeat career politician Jeanne Shaheen this November and preserve our U.S. Senate majority.
These are challenging times for our nation, and Corky is working to safeguard our conservative values. With Donald Trump's endorsement, he has pledged to continue the President's record of success and ensure we remain a nation dedicated to individual liberty and economic freedom.

Among the events scheduled:

8:30-9:15am – SALEM -- Door Knocking Kickoff, Tuscan Market

10:15-10:45am – ROCHESTER -- Door Knocking Kickoff, Trump Victory Office, 120 Washington St.

12:45-1:15pm – DERRY -- Door Knocking Kickoff/Volunteer Lunch, Trump Victory Office,21 East Broadway St.

4-4:30pm – MANCHESTER -- Volunteer Thank-You Pizza Party, Trump Victory Office, 377 S. Willow St.

Join the effort -- making calls, knocking on doors or placing signs and help us spread this message in your own community today! [**Click here to learn more**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ad7da947cffc5e36/eb7f28a2d46f43abc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Former N.H. Senate President and Current Republican Leader Chuck Morse Endorses Corky**
Former Senate President and current Republican leader Chuck Morse has endorsed Corky’s U.S. Senate run.

"Corky Messner is a veteran who has honorably served our country and a businessman who understands what it will take to get our economy back on its feet and moving again,” says Morse. “I’m endorsing him today because his leadership and vision make him our best choice to take on and defeat Senator Shaheen this fall.”

[**Read more on our website**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ad7da947cffc5e36/427f75f90b257e80c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**It's Been Non-Stop on the Campaign Road!**
Corky’s been busy, meeting with lots of folks across New Hampshire this past week, and it’s sure to get busier as we approach Primary Day. Among his recent stops was a meeting with young GOP volunteers, and he was joined by Republican National Committee Co-Chair Tommy Hicks and First District Congressional Candidate Matt Mowers.
He also had other events during the past few days, and he continues to build his grassroots support and share his message of individual liberty and economic freedom. Go, Corky!
|
---
**Upcoming Events - Where's Corky?**
Here are just a few events on Corky’s campaign schedule this coming week. Does he have wings...or just an endless supply of energy?

**Monday, August 17**
5th Annual Homeland Heroes Golf Tournament, Windham Country Club

**Tuesday, August 18**
Senator Regina Birdsell's annual Taste of the Towns Reception, Castleton Banquet and Conference Center

**Wednesday, August 19**
8th Annual Manchester GOP Tiki Fundraiser, KC's Rib Shack, Manchester

**Thursday, August 20**
Business Roundtable / Fundraiser event, Bedford Villege Inn, 2 Olde Bedford Way, Bedford

**Friday, August 21**
Candidates Night, Old Salisbury Town Hall, Old Turnpike Rd, Salisbury

Nottingham & Northwood GOP Meet the Candidates Night, 139 Stage Rd, Nottingham
|
---
**Sign of the Times**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ad7da947cffc5e36/658852685083737ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: EugeneForCongress.com
subject: Our big campaign updates this week →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Earlier this week, we launched our first TV ad to share Eugene’s story with voters across PA-10. And just a few days ago, a new poll was released showing Eugene leading Scott Perry in the fight to represent PA-10.
It’s been quite the week on Team Eugene, friend!

Earlier this week, we launched our first TV ad to share Eugene’s story with voters across PA-10. **And just a few days ago, a new poll was released showing Eugene leading Scott Perry in the fight to represent PA-10.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18697488/236829220/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.15_b1_efc.com_all-nd&refcode2=79af8bdd-03df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWFmOGJkZC0wM2RmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rf5T_KgKrQOS2B9yVeana_7VKZBDs-eTpu2wtEcSsDA=) | [Help Eugene flip PA-10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18697489/236829221/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.15_b1_efc.com_all-nd&refcode2=79af8bdd-03df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWFmOGJkZC0wM2RmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rf5T_KgKrQOS2B9yVeana_7VKZBDs-eTpu2wtEcSsDA=)
---

Team, this news comes after a massive GOP super PAC announced that they were doubling down on their efforts to prop up Scott Perry and keep PA-10 in Republican hands -- **upping their investment in our district to a total of $1.25 million. **

Our best shot at fighting back against special interest influence relies on our ability to continue airing ads and reaching voters with the truth about Eugene’s background and leadership.

[**We still need to raise another $6,335 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we have the resources to keep our ad on the air. # 1st Annual Gala of No Dem Left Behind
---
**8.22 | 7:30pm EST Online Fundraiser** Our online fundraiser event with Mia’s national coalition, No Dem Left Behind is featuring Mark Hamill, himself along with Kristen Johnston, Rosie O’Donnell, Brooklyn Dad, Debra Messing, and Piper Parebo. We welcome you to join with your questions for our candidates and guest hosts. Each Candidate will be asked a question or two by our guests on how they won their primary and what is needed to succeed this November. name: AmyKennedyForCongress.com
subject: This was a really big week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
It was a big week for our campaign. Here’s what you might have missed:
* A poll released Thursday morning showed Amy _**taking the lead for the very first time**_ over the turncoat Congressman Jeff Van Drew.

* Then another poll released the very same day showed **Amy leading Van Drew by an even bigger margin,_51%-46%_**.

* And yesterday, the Cook Political Report _**moved our race from “Lean Republican” to “Toss-Up.”**_

We have real momentum right now. But these new polls are well within the margin of error, and there’s a significant cash on hand gap to close to catch up to Jeff Van Drew. **Will you pitch in $10 or more to our campaign before the mid-FEC deadline at midnight tonight to help close the gap?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18699375/236865387/1794198601?refcode=em200815-update&express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGNhZDcyMC0xMWRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnsyNB2wmo2y2deVFscm7aDXhcZS0bO9lMddgAkYW-Y=)

clean_body: | It was a big week for our campaign. Here’s what you might have missed: A poll released Thursday morning showed Amy taking the lead for the very first time over the turncoat Congressman Jeff Van Drew. Then another poll released the very same day showed Amy leading Van Drew by an even bigger margin,51%-46%. And yesterday, the Cook Political Report moved our race from “Lean Republican” to “Toss-Up.” We have real momentum right now. But these new polls are well within the margin of error, and there’s a significant cash on hand gap to close to catch up to Jeff Van Drew. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

They’re ready to throw everything they have at this race to stop us, so we cannot afford to miss a step now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Matt Gaze Finance Director Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = * Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

We are only three days away from our biggest Federal Election Commission deadline so far in this election, and I need your help.

With just a few months left until the election, we need to show Vern Buchanan and all of the pundits that our campaign is in the strongest position possible to flip this seat and bring accountability to Washington.

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18700901/236897224/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGFlY2MwZi0xY2RmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mETzEo0HAyCANTjGQfcyzS3eM8WjvL3z1-xyTc_7gOM=)**

With just a few months left until the election, we need to show Vern Buchanan and all of the pundits that our campaign is in the strongest position possible to flip this seat and bring accountability to Washington. I’m committed to representing you and our shared values in Congress, but in order to win this election I need a commitment from you. = = = = = = = Making a recurring monthly contribution is one of the best ways to help our campaign, because it helps us prepare our budget for the final months ahead knowing that we can count on your help month in and month out. Thank you for your support and commitment to bring real, positive change to Florida and our country. Margaret PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

body:

|

Peter,

Thanks to supporters like you we're in a great place with 80 days left until the election. **New polling shows that MJ is within _one point_ of Senator Cornyn!** That's a testament to our incredible grassroots support.

But now things are going to get tougher. Because Sen. Cornyn and Mitch McConnell see the same polls we do, you can bet they're going to react by throwing millions more dollars into this race.

We have a plan. **We 're setting a goal of bringing 300 new supporters on board by tomorrow's mid-month deadline.** That'll give us the firepower we need to take on the attacks our opponents throw at us and finish this month strong. **Will you be one of the new* supporters we need?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Andrew Garbarino
subject: too liberal for Long Island
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
My opponent, Jackie Gordon, wants you to believe that she’s always been a moderate who will cut taxes for the middle class and improve healthcare. | |
---
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=64a6bdf9751546a3a82064363f03952e&_e=KWls6RoJ2NWZ94cF9souCe2Kpw231enOEv3DOOrhRz8fcJoFI8Rdokg1RGAr5zSLioX0g9qGy3f0JN5UBjuTKGuhCjTfrnkudfjzlPjZwj-Fs6aepzQHRvVSxPTtUkop-W4RnMUYIUkS8O2kL66_vqN9nTdhHY9BU1NtYTUhzNzIrxY_O9CPdpCJNLGVskdBlBuZAg64suuZ1_VxKw-gnx29tdFt8LyTif0rYZaVBV61WdHZ7LK98RFSNXGc-KKrsh3H16JflemLvijj7yVqT_B3KgYTJ_DtmRbH1iSnq9oXjgjlL1ZbhGwOm5nEHj4GT9IU5gwlP4V1Ib4DTSnbkW_Sz1L2e72zlCxOOL0VdAIBRQCY80ldo81pIz19yG07c2MKmo_VvCz4iJV1HgB53LsxPbTegpLUxd5tq2m-v8XW1Q2ZHVrbsVHd4QLY306H)
Peter,

My opponent, Jackie Gordon, wants you to believe that she’s always been a moderate who will cut taxes for the middle class and improve healthcare. Her stated stances on the issues are purposely vague and generic because she knows that her _**REAL**_ policies are too liberal for Long Island!

**Here are the facts about Jackie Gordon's “moderate” record: **

❌ Jackie Gordon was gladly endorsed by Ayanna Pressley, a close SOCIALIST ally of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez! **[I’ve been endorsed by dozens of local and national Republicans, not socialist friends of AOC>>](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=64a6bdf9751546a3a82064363f03952e&_e=KWls6RoJ2NWZ94cF9souCe2Kpw231enOEv3DOOrhRz8fcJoFI8Rdokg1RGAr5zSLioX0g9qGy3f0JN5UBjuTKGuhCjTfrnkudfjzlPjZwj-Fs6aepzQHRvVSxPTtUkop-W4RnMUYIUkS8O2kL66_vqN9nTdhHY9BU1NtYTUhzNzIrxY_O9CPdpCJNLGVskdBlBuZAg64suuZ1_VxKw-gn6oAG0h3MtxFMQYyW8Dt9X9FTqfslPx9RJ0XGAT2XdR2EilYTP0KyAv-K4AKmQJNNvFUzqNN9kDHa-8Ng1Pnb4V9JHW1xwBZu8E9IZll1BFNQ6K3TXdjg39birO8GhFhsulfC9NeQcc0I67e1Yryq2ey4tAZcelPaGhHueaTkAKsF9a7mphWOhkgJD3uIxu6HcbhZUcf6VS_WCtppC0hgatzJyKVerD-ODFmodUqAn_z)**

❌ Jackie Gordon has refused to comment on the “Defund the Police” movement, while the party she’s apart of actively supports it! **[I’m proud to say I stand with the men and women in blue>>](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=64a6bdf9751546a3a82064363f03952e&_e=KWls6RoJ2NWZ94cF9souCe2Kpw231enOEv3DOOrhRz8fcJoFI8Rdokg1RGAr5zSLioX0g9qGy3f0JN5UBjuTKGuhCjTfrnkudfjzlPjZwj-Fs6aepzQHRvVSxPTtUkop-W4RnMUYIUkS8O2kL66_vqN9nTdhHY9BU1NtYTUhzNzIrxY_O9CPdpCJNLGVskdBlBuZAg64suuZ1_VxKw-gnx_BwWgl_2jI85-j4cxcERAWxzke6JJ9VxoHzCzo43Uol9qYt4ETykgaLGZ36eLDDvwkdLRGiDja81qj-RlCjWySmBI4V-nAdbOH93y76jga5xxt2a5vKPWcjvem1vw8EZnGb7krL_aIfZfqPd4MI3E0VjF9UOcrh2k77fN8ZnbeMb4KnkYyEs3z8ZJqcz7_xlHD4LO3acSP5LaQv4eGtqqD-RYFvhmZnnTaFZJkyrVF)**

❌ Jackie Gordon claims she wants to fix your healthcare, what that really means is taking away your private healthcare and replacing it with a government-controlled socialist system! **[I’ll fight for real change in making healthcare solutions, not prop up socialist pipe dreams>>](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=64a6bdf9751546a3a82064363f03952e&_e=KWls6RoJ2NWZ94cF9souCe2Kpw231enOEv3DOOrhRz8fcJoFI8Rdokg1RGAr5zSLioX0g9qGy3f0JN5UBjuTKGuhCjTfrnkudfjzlPjZwj-Fs6aepzQHRvVSxPTtUkop-W4RnMUYIUkS8O2kL66_vqN9nTdhHY9BU1NtYTUhzNzIrxY_O9CPdpCJNLGVskdBlBuZAg64suuZ1_VxKw-gn82YyxVTWpPnoALMgV8pa9mCzxP61HbnoFe_GXOsX6dt92xsN4fkpTe7jH5mc9gHUBWyzib8zg95VUWvhEn3-M-BQUui4pHi6X6PVJOI01W2ZrZL89bZ5mzrLO-DNeRm8sL3RN-EYGb9knJUZD65FKYBgbmMxBEqCKv124C3lGrBm07W11AD0vT6DNT0hxWh5NlloxdsV_spo3kSzg5x091M6302Lnoa4RtDTSihhqXL)**

Why is my opponent so afraid of telling _**YOU**_ what she really supports? Because she knows that she is _**TOO LIBERAL FOR LONG ISLAND**_. Her silence on “Defunding the Police” is especially concerning for a community for Long Island where we respect and support our police.

**That’s why we must hold Long Island this November because if we lose this seat, then Jackie Gordon will bring the same failed liberal policies of New York City into Long Island.** Peter, I’m going to need your help. **[Will you help me DEFEAT the Long Island Liberal, Jackie Gordon, and CRUSH this Mid-Month Goal before MIDNIGHT?](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=64a6bdf9751546a3a82064363f03952e&_e=KWls6RoJ2NWZ94cF9souCe2Kpw231enOEv3DOOrhRz8fcJoFI8Rdokg1RGAr5zSLioX0g9qGy3f0JN5UBjuTKGuhCjTfrnkudfjzlPjZwj-Fs6aepzQHRvVSxPTtUkop-W4RnMUYIUkS8O2kL66_vqN9nTdhHY9BU1NtYTUhzNzIrxY_O9CPdpCJNLGVskdBlBuZAg64suuZ1_VxKw-gn_hOQSbxXTa1vh2qoUESpYHd7LtMz55QJE9F6HSPHnoWm8_7AinzIukM2q9gsr9bTOJ_UOWFFcjA47jc3TgsPrpGvsPTFbP71KaHnNybAU1FmVZVk89ZybJTbTEyGqU-FLm2Hw05PAQab8L7x4yGyjqr2OwhA9eOeWjySpi3mjfdw-XaliwTXN9-3Oh2zgI0MEeawhtQ1-wks_L5Q41yu0DkKeI4VSj9YHpD1UqxsPas)**

body:

| | **Last quarter our Democrat opponent outraised us. ** **Tonight is the quarterly fundraising deadline and we need a strong showing to tell Montana voters and outside groups that Troy Downing is the favorite in this race. ** **If we get outraised again, outside groups may see this as a contested race. ** **We cannot allow this to happen. ** **Please, please, please donate today. Even $5 shows these outside groups that Troy has strong grassroots support. **
---

---
| **Losing is not an option for Montana families and small business owners. Troy is a businessman--not a lobbyist, lawyer, or politician. ** **Our Democrat opponent recently posted that he was only a few points behind us. Out-of-state dark-money could easily make this race competitive. ** **We have to keep the Auditor's office and our Land Board in conservative hands. ** _**Donate now to ensure this race for Auditor isn’t decided by out-of-state special interest groups. **_ **Troy has created good-paying jobs across Montana and the country. It’s this kind of leadership we need more of in Helena. Just because our opponent has been a politician and lobbyist for years doesn't mean he deserves this highly important position. ** **-Sam Loveridge (Campaign Manager)**

| Freinds,

This week has been huge for our campaign!

ICYMI, a new poll places us leading our radical opponent. We've earned the endorsements of pro-life and pro-business organizations. And over 100 ag leaders have announced their support for Mariannette.

This is good news but we are still in a dead heat race. We need all the help you can give to push us over the edge on November 3rd. We are 80 days out from Election Day and we need all hands on deck!

We can win this! Can we count on your support to bring it home?[ ](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=001c1e997f&e=16fac31a0f)[Click here to donate $10, $20 or even $100 to help us flip this seat!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=ec66e68900&e=16fac31a0f)

Austin Harris

---
| | **[BREAKING: BARACK OBAMA SLAMS TRUMP'S POST OFFICE SABOTAGE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")** [SIGN THE PETITION: President Obama just broke his silence on Trump's unprecedented sabotage of our post office. We need 50,000 signatures on the emergency petition to stop Trump from BANKRUPTING the post office, DELAYING our mail ballots, and STEALING this election. Will you stand with President Obama and sign to save the USPS right away? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30") | Wow. Barack Obama just SLAMMED Trump for sabotaging our post office.

[**President Obama needs immediate backup to SAVE the post office and STOP Trump from stealing this election.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")

[**_STAND WITH OBAMA: Before midnight, we need 50,000 signatures on the emergency petition to STOP Trump from bankrupting the post office, sabotaging our mail ballots, and downright stealing this election. President Obama would not have broken his silence if this wasn 't absolutely dire to saving our election. Will you add your name immediately? >>_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")
** ** [****NAME** : dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")
** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")**
---

Barack Obama just broke his silence.

[_**That 's how close the post office is to collapsing.**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")

Obama SLAMMED Trump and Republicans' despicable mail ballot sabotage.

\-- They're [**BLOCKING**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30") emergency post office funds
\-- They're [**SLASHING**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30") hours for USPS employees
\-- They're even [**REMOVING**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30") mailboxes from the streets!!

Trump is terrified he'll lose this election -- so he's trying to stop Americans from voting by mail and voting him OUT of office.

President Obama needs our IMMEDIATE backup to save this election before it's too late.

[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We must NOT let Trump corrupt our post office and sabotage this election. It'll take 50,000 signatures on the emergency petition to stand with President Obama, RESCUE the post office from collapse, and STOP Trump's disgusting ploy to take this election. Will you sign immediately? >> ](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a95/3360680369/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200815_em_pet_b1_poalrtv_30")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a8e/3360680369/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a8f/3360680369/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a8c/3360680369/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a88/3360680369/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a8a/3360680369/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2e4/18e32a7f/4dd0cec1/7b211a8d/3360680369/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? "" We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, "". If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on "" or "" or "" or online at www.benraylujan.com_. Click "" to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: hitting our mid-month goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I hope this email finds you well. I want to take a moment to thank you for being a member of Team Warner and to explain why hitting our mid-month goal this August is absolutely critical to sending Mark Warner back to the Senate.

With about 80 days to go until Election Day on November 3rd, our team knows it's time to kick things into high gear. This campaign is different from any other I've ever worked on. The pandemic has forced us to shift events online and start talking virtually with voters. To do this, we've had to make big, unexpected investments in digital outreach, and it's my job to make sure we have the money we need to pull it off.

**To stay on track, we cannot fall short on even one fundraising goal. That 's why I'm asking for your help.

[If you have the means, will you chip in today to help power Mark Warner's re-election campaign to victory this November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4c/53d9897e/54399fba/1c882f67/2789536473/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augmm?refcode=20200815_f_1_nd__710__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Another major challenge will be the unprecedented demand for mail-in ballots, and a current administration that seems dead set on blocking the U.S. Postal Service from getting the funding it needs. We've had to start helping people make their plan to vote earlier than ever before this year, which made us shift our field and outreach strategy.

Team Warner has been working tirelessly to connect with voters, make sure they have the resources they need, and check that folks feel comfortable with their options to cast their ballot this year. I'm amazed by the hard work that our staffers and volunteers have already put in to make sure we re-elect Mark Warner and elect Democrats up and down the ballot during this extremely challenging time.

Our organizers are doing their jobs, which means I've got a job to do too. As the finance director, it's my responsibility to keep this campaign running smoothly by making sure our organizers have the tools they need to do their jobs.

**[So please, if you have the means, please chip in and help us meet our critically important mid-month goal.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4c/53d9897e/54399fba/1c882f66/2789536473/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augmm?refcode=20200815_f_1_nd__710__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Whether you're able to give today or not, please know that donors like you are what keeps this campaign moving forward, and your support means the world to us. Thank you for supporting Mark Warner.

-- Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4c/53d9897e/54399fba/1c882f65/2789536473/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcxMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-augmm?refcode=20200815_f_1_nd__710__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4c/53d9897e/54399fba/1c882f64/2789536473/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: We've been reviewing the results, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We've been reviewing the results of our Convention Attendees Issues Survey and we noticed we're still missing your response >> |
---
This morning we've been reviewing the results of our Convention Attendees Issues Survey and we noticed we're still missing your response, Peter!

It's important that we hear from each and every one of our supporters before the convention starts. After all, it's just a couple of days away, Peter, and we need to know what you want to hear about from Team Joe during our 4-day event!

[Will you add your voice to the conversation and help shape our Democratic National Convention?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c0a/3227659783/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns") | **Convention Attendees Issues Survey** **Name:** Peter Willis
**Status:** Incomplete

[Peter, if you want to have a say in the convention and important elements of our campaign, please click here to take this crucial survey now »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c0a/3227659783/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns") | [TAKE THE SURVEY ➞](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c0a/3227659783/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
---
Here's what some members of Team Joe have said so far:
* The top four responses for which issues are top priorities this election are: health concerns with COVID-19, climate change, health care, and racial justice.

* Respondents were most concerned with making sure our campaign focused on leadership and following the advice of experts, instead of denial and lack of leadership during the coronavirus crisis.

* And 87% of respondents said they will tune in for all or part of the Democratic National Convention.

**With only two days left until the start of our convention, there 's no time left to wait. Peter, we're counting on you to add your voice and let us know the priorities that will shape this convention week and this campaign from now through the election.**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Convention-Attendee-Issue-Survey](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c0a/3227659783/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-convention-attendee-issue-survey?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.15_B1_consurv_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")

Thanks, Peter. We can't wait to hear your thoughts!

JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c08/3227659783/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c06/3227659783/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c04/3227659783/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c02/3227659783/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3c00/3227659783/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cfe/3227659783/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cfb/3227659783/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cf9/3227659783/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cf7/3227659783/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cf6/3227659783/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cfb/3227659783/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cf4/3227659783/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cf9/3227659783/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbc1/1cd0ac28/164965d08/357e3cf2/3227659783/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

Friend,
The Democrat Convention is ONLY 2 days away, and we need to maximize our efforts if we’re going to stop Sleepy Joe, Phony Kamala, and their RADICAL agenda.

From the very first day of this Administration, President Trump has fought to lower taxes, secure our borders, protect the unborn, and defend our great law enforcement. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are promising to do the EXACT opposite.

The stakes have never been higher, Friend, and we need your support if we’re going to stay on track this month and have the resources to continue outpacing the Silicon Valley MEGA DONORS.

For the NEXT HOUR, all contributions will receive a 600%-MATCH.

| Peter,
Today marks just 80 days until the November election, and only 3 days until my primary election in Florida. With many Americans still out of work due to the coronavirus and violent protests taking over American cities, the 2020 election is going to be the most critical of our lifetime.
[In order to make it through the final 80 days of our America-First campaign, I'm looking for 80 Patriots to step in and donate today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011bTkEA45LQZRG0UpdLfwgoIiew4jho7rKMIR8ZlOzdYKlZPuvMLfWLPcPkYLWuw0N4GBi9Jc9rgcXZTnYWMDKqwin5eC5YydYEfUyRgve91nHIXT5wI9UPznfJtn06fq8crbu5dxJBBLVbx8ywJCZStao0ayDWRu_X7uqJHkPnw=&c=D-H-TEvet6WtDStIawLHBkx_5bj1hD40plMbsb2BbxABiWb-ZlW8aA==&ch=1GV-zFSpIWajSAmP2yi3IA4X7qx6CTsyEYTrqCEvg1knCIDvEgomJQ==)
Because my job is to serve you, I only take donations from you. I swore off corporate PAC money earlier this year (the only incumbent Republican to do so) which means I rely on small, grassroots donations to fund our campaign.
---

I hope you can donate today so that I can continue to fight for you (not corporations, Big Tech, or foreign-owned businesses) in Congress!

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
**Good news** : A new poll shows Amy ahead of our opponent by _five points_. This is a clear sign that our grassroots movement is gaining momentum and a huge boost to our campaign. **But here’s the bad news** : We’re on track to fall a little short of our fundraising goal and we only have _a few more hours_ to make up the difference. It’s clear this race is going to be close, and with a House GOP super PAC spending over $45 million attacking Democrats across the country, we need the resources to fight back. So we’re asking: **Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help us reach our mid-FEC fundraising goal before our midnight deadline? But here’s the bad news : We’re on track to fall a little short of our fundraising goal and we only have a few more hours to make up the difference. We just wanted to reach out and give you a quick breakdown of where we stand in our race, and what you can do to help us moving forward. | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=0a6b193b5f49491bbe49e5c8daa8002d&_e=NMb_i0CqBVr2eSXLjsnJgbOUZoSwSNGsQLJTfrkJIeQTLsa5gA-TUXPGwOnhV4umRV-xlXOIkGb5PhFiLeXBoi7PWjULnRL2LhAs4eVbII0EYDFCYVcmWNmFIUzc852wLAKFXQSPlShzwk_fyXChpyWgrlIjukOMwxmO169ezE1xSsWHSBvQjGRXxEIgQpLRbnN0VoQS2W9B7Xcp1awbS_og5E8_kNvysSSiQBsZROajbZs5zNRhMHU6LKcMBo5vqt7AhzZlGuBXIxEWU7sVpBF2y5FzG6LpwxElkJZ9Ucze4Ib0igW9-H-kqtYsqvsQxqEHnouF0-QpogY7Mm-PDKn5RCHzYHUFhVZbRmv4KXtUfqJT_DZXhgVxuj0HaasahmYYX7VvbrNsV1FOnS8bcg1hi2guKTJ2ObGwzC239AOiE6bIV8plAh0rmy6xUVAFQRtS0RJ2so_AkAaVKxulKSWZtsfU5i0hzDXqqo6Npuw%3D) |

Friend, do you have a second?

We just wanted to reach out and give you a quick breakdown of where we stand in our race, and what you can do to help us moving forward.

_**First off, our momentum is surging and Hoosiers from every corner of Indiana are coming together to support Eric, and join him in continuing to work toward One Indiana for All.**_

_Just look at who has thrown their support behind Eric already:_
* Indiana State Police Alliance
* Indiana Chamber of Commerce
* Indiana Builders Association
* National Federation of Independent Business
* Indiana State Building and Construction Trades

* Northwestern Building and Construction Trades Council
* Professional Firefighters Union of Indiana
* Indiana REALTORS PAC
* Indiana Manufacturers Association

We’re honored to have the support of so many Hoosiers and Hoosier job creators, and we can’t wait to keep building One Indiana for All with them for another four years.

Earlier this month, we hit the airwaves statewide with our first TV ad -- and we’re reaching more everyday with our uniting message.

**But we can’t let up — Election Day is just around the corner, and we need to make sure that we’re firing on all cylinders as we head into the final stretch.**

Here’s how you can help: we’re going to be campaigning online more than ever before, and, unfortunately, that costs money. We rely on our grassroots community to help us spread the word about our campaign digitally, and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today.

clean_body: We just wanted to reach out and give you a quick breakdown of where we stand in our race, and what you can do to help us moving forward. | | | ---|---|--- Friend, do you have a second? We just wanted to reach out and give you a quick breakdown of where we stand in our race, and what you can do to help us moving forward. First off, our momentum is surging and Hoosiers from every corner of Indiana are coming together to support Eric, and join him in continuing to work toward One Indiana for All. Just look at who has thrown their support behind Eric already: Indiana State Police Alliance Indiana Chamber of Commerce Indiana Builders Association National Federation of Independent Business Indiana State Building and Construction Trades Northwestern Building and Construction Trades Council Professional Firefighters Union of Indiana Indiana REALTORS PAC Indiana Manufacturers Association We’re honored to have the support of so many Hoosiers and Hoosier job creators, and we can’t wait to keep building One Indiana for All with them for another four years. Earlier this month, we hit the airwaves statewide with our first TV ad -- and we’re reaching more everyday with our uniting message. But we can’t let up — Election Day is just around the corner, and we need to make sure that we’re firing on all cylinders as we head into the final stretch. Here’s how you can help: we’re going to be campaigning online more than ever before, and, unfortunately, that costs money. We rely on our grassroots community to help us spread the word about our campaign digitally, and that’s why we’re reaching out to you today. Can we count on you to sponsor our digital efforts in the home stretch? Chip in below to help us win the digital fight. ** Thank you for your support — we’ll stay in touch. Sincerely, Your Holcomb Crew | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Make a Plan to Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e026/3518551579/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Exactly one month from today, Georgia will begin mailing vote by mail ballots to voters for the November 3 election. While voting has not started, you can take some simple steps to make a plan to vote! Donald Trump is actively seeking to undermine the U.S. Postal Service, and his actions have understandably caused serious concern among voters who wish to vote by mail. Why is Trump doing this? Because he is a failed president. Rather than letting his efforts cause fear and panic, let's fight back! To combat Trump's desperate actions, we recommend making a PLAN to vote as early as possible, either by mail, using a drop box, or in person. **Make a plan to vote in in the General Election - request your vote by mail ballot today, or make a plan to vote early to ensure your vote is counted as soon as possible. Find resources and information at [PeachVote.com.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e027/3518551579/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com/") ** If you vote by mail, be sure to return your ballot as quickly as possible, and once you return it, [track your ballot on My Voter Page](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e024/3518551579/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/mvp.do"). To make returning your ballot simple and efficient, consider returning it in a drop box! Contact your county election office to find a convenient drop box in your community. You can find your county election office's contact info [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e025/3518551579/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do"). **Also, tell your friends and family to make their plans to vote. To help Fair Fight get the word out to voters, share these posts and graphics on social media with your networks. **
* [Facebook](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e022/3518551579/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/photos/a.1515778911885948/2051853344945166")
* [Instagram](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e023/3518551579/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/p/CD6iWJ_prsG/")
* [Twitter ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e020/3518551579/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/status/1294654593092255745?s=20")

By spreading the word about voting by mail, you help Fair Fight give voters the information they need to make a plan to vote and request their absentee ballots now. **It 's time to make your voice heard -- make your plan today so that you can cast your ballot and have it count in the 2020 General Election. ** Thank you, Team Fair Fight |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e021/3518551579/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e02e/3518551579/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa454/34a064cc/1bf0838f/702e02f/3518551579/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Ellen Foster
subject: What we might have to scrap
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We need to close the gap by tonight! |
---
Hi there,

I just checked our numbers, and I'm concerned about where we're at right now.

I'll be frank, and get right to the point: **We're BEHIND the pace we should be at for August.**

**We need to raise $20,000 by midnight tonight to stay on track to meet our August fundraising goal.** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2600/5b2c1286/3eed594c/25f19d03/271822989/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_am?refcode=em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_am") **_Friend, I know you must get lots of emails about "fundraising deadlines," but they are crucial for us to be able to budget out our voter protection programs, digital organizing, and advertising spends for the fall -- all of which we need for Jon to win in November._**

Jon and David Perdue are absolutely deadlocked in the polls. In a race this tight that's surely going down to the wire, _every dollar matters_.

**We can't afford to fall behind in fundraising,_especially when Jon's opponent is being propped up by millions of dollars in dark money_.**

**[Can you chip in $16 RIGHT NOW to help us close the gap before our mid-month deadline?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2600/5b2c1286/3eed594c/25f19d02/271822989/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_am?refcode=em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_am&amount=16")**

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Did you get Jon's email?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
Marsha asked me to reach out because we're coming up on an important deadline tomorrow, and still far behind our goal.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/SubscriptionCenter/BlackburnSubscriptionCenter?spMailingID=43205145&spUserID=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&spJobID=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2&spReportId=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2)
****
****
__

********Did you see the email I had Jon send?

I wouldn't bother you if it wasn't critically important, but meeting our mid-month goal is absolutely essential for us to stay on track to raise the resources needed to take on the Left.

In response to Joe Biden choosing _the most progressive member of the Senate as his running mate_ and the Democrats' increasing attacks on Senate Republicans in critical battleground states, I am officially authorizing a** 5X MATCH on ALL grassroots donations made by 11:59 tonight.**

Peter, we're running out of time to make an impact. Joe and Kamala are already hard at work, plotting to take the White House and Senate.

**I 'm asking you personally to step up and do your part to help us fight back and protect our agenda. **
**
RUSH IN YOUR CONTRIBUTION**

**[$250-> $1,250](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDUxNDUS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) [$100 -> $500](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDUxNDUS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[$50 -> $250](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDUxNDUS1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) [$25 -> $125](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDUxNDUS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

[**< BY 11:59 TONIGHT - 5X MATCH A CUSTOM AMOUNT >**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDUxNDUS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTIwOTI5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

\--- Original Message ---
**To: "Peter" <dpwillis67@gmail.com>**
From: Jon (Team Marsha)
Date: Thursday, August 14, 2020 at 5:04 PM CDT
Subject: Can you believe this nonsense?

Peter, Marsha asked me to reach out because we're coming up on an important deadline tomorrow, and still far behind our goal.

name: Biden for President
subject: Peter, are you a vote for the Biden-Harris ticket?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Even if you've answered a similar poll for us before, it is important we get an updated response from you. |
---
Hi Peter,

We're sure you've heard the news by now, but we're so excited that we have to share it again:

**Joe Biden has officially selected Kamala Harris as his running mate for this November's election.**

After a thorough and thoughtful vetting process with some of the most brilliant voices this country has to offer, Vice President Biden wholeheartedly believes he and Kamala Harris together can -- and will -- defeat Donald Trump and win this battle for the soul of our nation.

With just under three months to go until Election Day and the Biden-Harris ticket now formalized, it is important now more than ever to show our future President and VP that they've got our support.

**So we're setting a goal to collect 725 responses from Pennsylvania to this newest poll. Peter, are you willing to represent Pennsylvania today and let us know if you plan to vote for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris this November?** __| __| __ **Do you plan to vote for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris this fall in Pennsylvania?**

| | [YES >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e4602/393513238/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/august-vote-for-joe-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
| [NO >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e4602/393513238/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/august-vote-for-joe-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
| [UNDECIDED >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e4602/393513238/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/august-vote-for-joe-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
__
__
Even if you've answered a similar poll for us before, it is important we get an updated response from you, Peter. **That's why we hope you'll be one of the 725 people we need from Pennsylvania to respond.**

Peter, we face challenges both known and unknown in the lead-up to Election Day. But Joe isn't running scared, and neither is Kamala. Both are committed to fighting everyday on your behalf, and to restoring the dignity of our nation in the process. It's on us to do everything in our power not only to defeat Donald Trump, but to also send a resounding message that his brand of politics will no longer be accepted in these United States of America.

We know your time is precious, especially right now, and so we've made this survey easy to complete. **Peter, please click below to begin our new supporter poll and let us know if you plan to vote for Joe and Kamala in Pennsylvania this November:**

[https://go.joebiden.com/vote-for-joe-kamala-in#PA](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e4602/393513238/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/august-vote-for-joe-kamala-poll?source=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_POLL_2020.08.15_B2_vote4jrbkdh_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Let's make history on November 3. Are you in?

Team Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e4601/393513238/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e4600/393513238/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46ff/393513238/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fe/393513238/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fd/393513238/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fc/393513238/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fb/393513238/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fa/393513238/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46f9/393513238/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46f8/393513238/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fb/393513238/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46f7/393513238/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46fa/393513238/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbd6/1cd0ac28/164c3704d/357e46f6/393513238/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

Peter, please click below to begin our new supporter poll and let us know if you plan to vote for Joe and Kamala in Pennsylvania this November: "" Let's make history on November 3. Are you in? Team Joe | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: [ALERT] - via Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Good news and bad news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Help us stop the GOP and gain Senate control! |
---
Friend, we have some good news and some bad news.

**First, the good news:** Jon Ossoff is neck and neck in the polls, and the race is officially a toss-up. With our grassroots energy growing everyday, Jon has all the momentum.

**But then there's the bad news:** Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the rest of the GOP know all of this. Their super PACs are dumping MILLIONS into this race to protect corrupt David Perdue and save their majority.

**We are confident this people-first, grassroots movement will power Jon to victory -- but we are falling behind for August. We need $20,000 by tonight to stay on track for the month.**

Jon's campaign is not taking any corporate PAC contributions, so we're relying on our small-dollar grassroots team to keep us strong in this fight against the GOP machine.

**[Friend, can you rush a donation RIGHT NOW so we can hit our mid-August goal and keep Jon on the path to victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e262f/5b2c1286/3f16287a/25f19d45/1477409083/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_pm?refcode=em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_pm")**

body:

|

| | The mid-quarter deadline is tomorrow, and I'm chatting with Kathy shortly to go over our fundraising numbers. For Kathy, everything comes back to North Carolinians.
Kathy is an attorney, a longtime community leader, a small business owner, and a mother of three. She's been involved in the community for three decades, bringing people together to solve our biggest issues. She's helped ensure North Carolinians have access to food and health care; can afford their mortgages, rent, and college; and navigate career changes.
Now, she's ready to serve North Carolinians on a bigger scale as the first woman to represent North Carolina's 6th District. She's fighting to make health care affordable, strengthen job opportunities, and help small businesses thrive.
But Kathy can't do it without you.
Kathy isn't accepting any corporate PAC money. Every dollar you give helps grow our grassroots organization and voter outreach efforts so we can flip NC-06 for the first time in 30 years and give the Triad the leadership it deserves.
[_**We 're investing our time and resources to connect with voters online, over the phone, and through mail and digital advertising. Reaching our goals allows us to execute that and more. So if you can, chip in now before the mid-quarter deadline ->**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d28a/3d199a51/2faeeb28/7364ab9d/1345323093/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDgxNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJiIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200815?refcode=kme200815_b_other&refcode2=17426")
Thanks,
Hailey

name: John Coady, MJ Hegar HQ
subject: Back foot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We have an opening to take the fight to Sen. Cornyn.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e023/1448909185/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Wanted to be sure you saw this, Peter -- with the race tightening, we're in a great position to take the fight to Sen. Cornyn. But as Election Day gets closer, you can be sure that Sen. Cornyn will be calling in more and more favors from his big money backers.

We can't be caught on our back foot, playing defense. Let's hit this mid-month goal and power through to November. **[Can I count on your help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e022/1448909185/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?refcode=email_20200815.2nd__1913__&amount=10")**

John Coady
Deputy Campaign Manager
MJ for Texas
\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **MJ Hegar Polling Update**
Subject: ONE POINT
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e021/1448909185/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?refcode=email_20200815.2nd_1913__&amount=10")
> ---
> Peter,
>
> Thanks to supporters like you we're in a great place with 80 days left until the election. **New polling shows that MJ is within _one point_ of Senator Cornyn!** That's a testament to our incredible grassroots support.
>
> But now things are going to get tougher. Because Sen. Cornyn and Mitch McConnell see the same polls we do, you can bet they're going to react by throwing millions more dollars into this race.
>
> We have a plan. **We 're setting a goal of bringing 300 new supporters on board by tomorrow's mid-month deadline.** That'll give us the firepower we need to take on the attacks our opponents throw at us and finish this month strong. **Will you be one of the new* supporters we need?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e020/1448909185/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200815.2nd__1913__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e027/1448909185/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200815.2nd__1913__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e026/1448909185/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200815.2nd__1913__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e025/1448909185/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200815.2nd__1913__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e024/1448909185/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?refcode=email_20200815.2nd__1913__")**
> The last few months of any campaign are the hardest. But with you on our side, we're going to win this race and bring the change we need to Texas and our country.
>
> Thank you,
> Team MJ
>
>
> *If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.
>
>

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e01b/1448909185/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1913&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e27/7f51f7bc/4365dad3/4ef7e01a/1448909185/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O.
