name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Let's elect these four terrific Democratic House candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
When Democrats take back control in Washington, we'll need to fight hard to undo the Trump administration's disastrous policies, clean corruption out of government, and put power in the hands of the p | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852504f/45c30650/1c2bafdd1/66e80821/1880722122/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Next January, our to-do list is going to be a mile long -- as long as we do everything we can to win big this November.

When Democrats take back control in Washington, we'll need to fight hard to undo the Trump administration's disastrous policies, clean corruption out of government, and put power in the hands of the people, where it belongs.

To get it done, we'll need strong fighters in the U.S. House -- so today, **I'm asking if you can pitch in to help elect four Democratic House candidates who will make us proud: Christina Hale in Indiana's 5th District, Cameron Webb in the Virginia 5th, Desiree Tims in the Ohio 10th, and Beth Doglio in Washington state's 10th.**

Three of them are running to expand our majority by flipping Republican-held seats, and all four of them are committed to putting Washington on the side of working people.

**[If it makes sense for you right now, I'd be deeply grateful if you made a contribution of $2 or whatever you can to support their campaigns and Warren Democrats.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852504f/45c30650/1c2bafdd1/66e80820/1880722122/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWNoLWN3LWR0LWJkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwNkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ch-cw-dt-bd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU06F_EGR_END_E_20200815_V1S2_P")**

I'm very glad to be shoulder to shoulder with Christina Hale, Cameron Webb, Desiree Tims, and Beth Doglio in this fight and all the fights to come.

**Christina Hale** is a lifelong Hoosier running for Congress in the heart of Mike Pence country. She understands the challenges facing 5th District Hoosiers because she faced many of the same struggles as a young single mom. As a nonprofit leader and member of the Indiana General Assembly, she earned a reputation for getting things done for families and children. She'll continue working to solve problems for her community when she gets to Congress.

And as a practicing physician and former health care policy advisor in the Obama administration, **Dr. Cameron Webb** has the expertise and experience needed to tackle our health care crisis and meet the coronavirus epidemic head on. Now more than ever, we need strong voices for equity and justice in Washington, and that is why I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with Cameron.

**Desiree Tims** understands the importance of creating a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. She will be a compassionate leader in Congress who will fight for quality jobs, education, and health care. At a time when families in her community are struggling, she has proven she can provide bold leadership so every family can access opportunity.

And **Beth Doglio** has proven herself to be a champion for the needs of working people in Washington state. From taking on special interests in the coal, oil, and the chemical industries to standing up to the wealthy and well-connected, she is a fighter who knows how to win. During this unprecedented time of crisis, working families need proven progressive leaders like Beth in Congress to call out corruption and stand up for the people.

**From Washington state to Ohio to Indiana and Virginia, Beth, Desiree, Christina, and Cameron are fighting their hearts out so they can get to Washington and get to work.

And they're counting on grassroots fighters like you -- from all across the country -- to help lead their campaigns to victory.**

[If you can, please make a donation today to help elect Christina Hale, Cameron Webb, Desiree Tims, Beth Doglio, and Democrats like them up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852504f/45c30650/1c2bafdd1/66e80820/1880722122/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWNoLWN3LWR0LWJkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwNkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ch-cw-dt-bd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU06F_EGR_END_E_20200815_V1S2_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852504f/45c30650/1c2bafdd1/66e80820/1880722122/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWNoLWN3LWR0LWJkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVUwNkZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwODE1X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ch-cw-dt-bd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU06F_EGR_END_E_20200815_V1S2_P")

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: real quick, friend

body:
I need your help. |
---
Friend,

Nearly two months out from Election Day, the polls have me LEADING or NECK AND NECK with David Perdue, and multiple nonpartisan analysts like the Cook Political Report have upgraded this race to a TOSS-UP!!

**But friend, I had a long briefing with the team last night, and our August fundraising is falling behind. I asked the team to set an immediate goal of raising $10,000 by midnight TONIGHT to get back on track, and that's why I'm reaching out to you directly.**

**Mitch McConnell, Donald Trump, David Perdue, and their GOP mega-donor cronies will do anything they can to stop me _(including doctoring a photo of my face to lengthen my nose in an anti-Semitic attack ad!!)_.**

They're spending tens of millions of dollars to save David Perdue and their Senate majority, friend.

But our people-powered campaign is refusing donations from corporate PACs and Congressional lobbyists, so I need massive grassroots support *right now* to beat their dirty money machine.

**[Friend, we need a boost today. Can you rush a donation before midnight?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e262c/5b2c1286/3f1b2075/25f19c93/1421673657/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_dl?refcode=em_2020_08_15_mid_mo_dl")**

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Peter, if you can chip in $5 today, it will make a huge impact in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We only have 80 days remaining to put in the work to win back the White House |
---
Peter,

I'm writing to you with just 80 days until the most important election of our lives, hopeful that you will make your first donation to my campaign this afternoon.

With November 3rd quickly approaching, the donations we receive in these next few days will be **the most impactful,** and here's why:

Our campaign is powered by a base of grassroots donors -- over 3 million now, in fact! -- who have pitched in to make our shared vision for our country a reality. And I know that, if we stand together, we will have what it takes to beat Donald Trump.

But it won't be easy, Peter. Last month, his campaign outraised ours by $25 million -- and they have $300 million more in the bank to broadcast more of his blatant lies across the country. So I'm asking you to help us pick up our fundraising pace today.

**Peter, we only have 80 days remaining to put in the work to win back the White House, and I 'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help get it done.**

[Everyone owns an equal piece of the battle for the soul of our nation -- and we need you to step up if we're going to win this fight. Will you make your first donation of $5 or more right now?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B3_80daysout_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B3_80daysout_X__F1_S2_C1__nd") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

[You can strengthen our grassroots moment with your first donation today. Please chip in $5 or whatever you can right away.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B3_80daysout_X__F1_S2_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B3_80daysout_X__F1_S2_C1__nd")

clean_body: We only have 80 days remaining to put in the work to win back the White House | Peter, I'm writing to you with just 80 days until the most important election of our lives, hopeful that you will make your first donation to my campaign this afternoon. With November 3rd quickly approaching, the donations we receive in these next few days will be the most impactful, and here's why: Our campaign is powered by a base of grassroots donors -- over 3 million now, in fact! -- who have pitched in to make our shared vision for our country a reality. And I know that, if we stand together, we will have what it takes to beat Donald Trump. But it won't be easy, Peter. Last month, his campaign outraised ours by $25 million -- and they have $300 million more in the bank to broadcast more of his blatant lies across the country. So I'm asking you to help us pick up our fundraising pace today. Peter, we only have 80 days remaining to put in the work to win back the White House, and I 'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to help get it done. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Peter, please know that your contribution is incredibly impactful, no matter how much you're able to give. And I'm grateful just to have you on my team. But if you're able to give now, there couldn't be a more important time to make your first donation. By pitching in, you're saying loud-and-clear that we will make this the fight of Trump's life -- and your $5 today will help us prepare for the critical final months of this race. "" Thank you for all you do, Joe | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
